Description
com.blackrook.gloop.glfw

com.blackrook.gloop.glfw.input.enums
Contains input enumerations.
  • Classes in com.blackrook.gloop.glfw.input.enums used by com.blackrook.gloop.glfw
    Class
    Description
    JoystickAxisType
    All valid input joystick axes.
    JoystickButtonType
    All valid input joystick buttons.
    JoystickDirectionType
    All valid input joystick direction positions.
    JoystickHatType
    All valid input joystick hat positions.
    KeyType
    All valid input keys.
    MouseAxisType
    All valid input mouse axes.
    MouseButtonType
    All valid input mouse buttons.
    MouseScrollType
    All valid input mouse scrolling.
